title: rubus crataegifolius
intro: Rubus crataegifolius, also known as the hawthorn-leaved bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Rubus crataegifolius include lowering blood pressure, improving heart health, and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease. Rubus crataegifolius can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and its leaves and stems can also be used in herbal infusions.
